steps.title: Find the key signal
steps.content: The passage’s decisive clue is the contrast in the final sentence: “New technologies may have changed some aspects… but jalis continue to be valued for knowing and protecting their peoples’ stories.” This shows the main idea hinges on a shift from changes to enduring importance.

steps.title: Match the meaning
steps.content: Choice A reflects the contrast by stating jalis remain focused on preserving stories despite changes. The other three either misrepresent the text’s focus (B and C mention specific roles not central to the main point) or frame the issue as technology replacing jalis (D), which reverses the passage’s emphasis. That matches choice A — A is correct.
